# React OAuth2 Application - Copilot Instructions

This is a full-stack application with React (TypeScript) frontend and Node.js Express (TypeScript) backend with OAuth2 authentication.

## Project Structure
- `client/` - React + TypeScript + Vite frontend
- `server/` - Node.js + Express + TypeScript backend
- `shared/` - Shared TypeScript types

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React, TypeScript, Vite, React Router, Axios
- Backend: Node.js, Express, TypeScript, Passport.js, OAuth2
- Authentication: Google OAuth2, JWT tokens, express-session

## Development Guidelines
- Use TypeScript strict mode
- Follow React hooks best practices
- Use async/await for asynchronous operations
- Implement proper error handling
- Use environment variables for sensitive data
